title: WorkerReplyPacket
description: Schema for the worker reply packet emitted at the end of each governance loop cycle.

generated_at_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the packet was generated.

overall_color.description: Aggregate health signal for the loop cycle.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of the cycle outcome.

validation_tokens.description: Validation token stream for this cycle.

blocked_next_step.description: The specific next step that is blocked, if overall_color is red.
